title: 叙事堆栈
brief: A conceptual technical diagram showing three stacked layers labeled from bottom to top: '现实层（可验证层）' with rocket, satellite, financial data charts; '愿景层（可能性层）' with Starship, Mars base sketch; '意义层（存在主义层）' with a human figure looking at distant Mars. Style: soft-tech-diagram, bilingual labels, clean modules. Landscape.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled '叙事堆栈'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a soft technical diagram, subtle dashed containers, layered modules, light academic visual language. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A conceptual technical diagram showing three stacked layers labeled from bottom to top: '现实层（可验证层）' with rocket, satellite, financial data charts; '愿景层（可能性层）' with Starship, Mars base sketch; '意义层（存在主义层）' with a human figure looking at distant Mars. Style: soft-tech-diagram, bilingual labels, clean modules. Landscape.
